name: ai-sdlc
description: AI-driven software delivery lifecycle for Claude Code. Two pipelines: (1) a clean, dependency-aware core pipeline — discuss → req2prd → prd2plan → (plan2jira | plan2linear) → execute-plan; and (2) an end-to-end test-driven pipeline (a "dark factory") that authors tests before code against a real mock app or Figma design, then builds to green — runnable fully lights-out via tdd-unattended.sh. Backed by 23 expert builder agents, 19 critic agents with a domain-matched affinity matrix, a mandatory Devil's Advocate adversarial gate, and shell-orchestrated execution with ralph-loop quality gates.
